_comment: Screenpipe configuration optimized for meeting capture. Copy relevant settings to your Screenpipe config.

screen._comment_capture: Event-driven captures only on app switch, click, typing pause — saves resources

meeting_detection._comment: Auto-detects Zoom, Teams, Google Meet, Slack meetings via UI element scanning

vocabulary._comment: Custom vocabulary improves transcription of frequently-used mixed-language terms
vocabulary.note: Add your team's common terms here. Used by Whisper initial_prompt and retranscription.

retranscription.prompt_hint: This is a bilingual meeting with Chinese and English. Technical terms may appear in either language.
retranscription.note: Retranscribe via API: POST http://localhost:3030/audio/retranscribe with start/end time range

ai_preset._comment: Configure your AI preset in Screenpipe UI: Settings > AI > Add Preset
ai_preset.note: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var or configure API key in Screenpipe settings

permissions_required: Screen Recording (System Settings > Privacy & Security > Screen Recording)

windows.system_audio: WASAPI Loopback — captures all system audio output
